body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria pass. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Description has structured PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE (5 precise file:line ranges) / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE sections. AC is numbered with 9 items; items 2-6 name specific Test* functions; item 7 supplies a -run filter with -count=1; items 8-9 are exactly the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test` green gate and `lefthook run pre-commit passes` closing lines. Labels carry phase:2, area:*, kind:feature, adr:024, spec:FEAT-010, plus split-from and supersedes cross-refs. Parent (ddx-5cb6e6cd) and dep (ddx-c2a66f45) are both explicit; the description DEPS block explains the relationship. No /tmp references, no chat references. Cold-read test passes: an agent can identify which files to open, which lines to change, and which tests to run without operator hand-curation.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}
